findings.issue: Qualifier text `team-maintained` is bolded, which violates the rule against bolding modifiers/limited scope words in正文.
findings.fix: Remove bold from qualifier words such as `team-maintained`; keep bold emphasis for technologies, scope signals, and quantified outcomes only.

revision_priority: [SHOULD] Remove bold formatting from qualifier words like `team-maintained` in the TikTok bullet and keep emphasis reserved for technical terms and measurable scope.
[NICE] Keep bold usage consistent across bullets so the visual emphasis stays on ownership, systems, and outcomes.
